name: Traditional Mincemeat 14
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a very large saucepan with just enough water to cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the meat and return it to the pan.
3. Add all remaining ingredients, except lemon juice and brandy, to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and reduce heat. Simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in lemon juice and brandy.
6. Ladle mincemeat into sterilized jars and seal. Cool and store. Allow the mincemeat to mature for at least 6 weeks before using.
